sustained_equation.structure_term: S_sustain = mix(S_persist, S_prop_scale, R_struct_true, D_structure_v15, B_struct_v21)
sustained_equation.context_term: C_sustain = mix(C_persist, C_prop_scale, 1 - Q_phase_true, D_route_v15, H_persist_v21)
sustained_equation.route_term: R_sustain = mix(R_persist, R_prop_scale, R_route_true, D_route_v15, H_persist_v21)
sustained_equation.learning_term: L_sustain = mix(L_persist, L_prop_scale, 1 - A_learn, R_train_v21, M_brain_direct_v15)
sustained_equation.system_term: M_sustain = S_sustain + C_sustain + R_sustain + L_sustain + R_sustain_sys - P_sustain

project_readout.summary: 更大系统持续回升验证开始直接检测补偿式回升能否在更大系统里继续站住，而不是重新掉回传播衰减区。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这组持续回升结果并回脑编码直测和训练终式，检查持续化是否开始变成更稳定的系统机制。
